pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_opentoonz.sh and downloading the official opentoonz_sample repo to confirm the zip extracts dwanko_run.tnz into the specified path.
Verified by checking setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this directory for the task output.
Verified by checking dwanko_run.tnz XML properties which indicate a total of 72 frames and fps of 24. The task description specifies a minimum of 24 frames.
Verified by reading verifier.py logic where the calculated corner/center brightness ratio is checked against this threshold.
Verified by reading verifier.py which uses this parameter to ensure the center region remains visible (mean brightness > 20).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official OpenToonz 'dwanko_run' sample project located at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. The project file has been confirmed to contain 72 frames of animation. The expected output destination is /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/vignette/, which is pre-created by the setup script. The evaluation uses a minimum rendering requirement of 24 frames, a vignette threshold ratio of 0.85 (corner brightness must be <85% of center brightness), and requires the center brightness to remain above a value of 20 to ensure visibility. All task parameters correctly align with the environment configuration and evaluation scripts.
